sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29020" key="du/szwos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠ´σ-ζωος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29020.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wretched</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βίοτος δ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.574</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
